scenarios.description: First reflection invocation of private static tagSet() initializes and returns non-empty tag set (init branch)
scenarios.expectedResult: returns a non-empty Set<String> containing known tag names and initializes static cache
pseudocode: TEST TC03 tagSet first-call initializes cache

scenarios.description: Second reflection invocation of private static tagSet() returns cached instance without reinitializing (cache branch)
scenarios.precondition: TC03 has been executed to populate the cache
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the same Set<String> instance as the first invocation
pseudocode: TEST TC04 tagSet second-call returns cached set
// assume cache populated by first invocation
